requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter) — Hungary / MAVIR
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）——匈牙利／MAVIR
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）——匈牙利／MAVIR

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to Hungarian grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Hungary's transmission system operator is MAVIR (Magyar Villamosenergia-ipari Átviteli Rendszerirányító Zrt.), which issues national grid-connection technical requirements (Hálózati Csatlakozási Szabályzat, HCSZ) aligned with the EU Network Code on Requirements for Generators (Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631, RfG). Distribution-level connection is regulated by the regional distribution system operators (DSOs) under MEKH oversight. The grid nominal voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, identical to EU standard but differing from China's 220/380 V baseline.
summary.zh: 接入匈牙利电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。匈牙利输电系统运营商为MAVIR（Magyar Villamosenergia-ipari Átviteli Rendszerirányító Zrt.），发布与欧盟发电机网络规程（欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631，RfG）协调一致的国家并网技术要求（Hálózati Csatlakozási Szabályzat，HCSZ）。配电层级连接由各区域配电系统运营商（DSO）在MEKH监管下负责。电网额定电压为230/400 V、50 Hz，与欧盟标准相同，但与中国220/380 V基线不同。
summary.zht: 接入匈牙利電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。匈牙利輸電系統運營商為MAVIR（Magyar Villamosenergia-ipari Átviteli Rendszerirányító Zrt.），發布與歐盟發電機網絡規程（歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631，RfG）協調一致的國家並網技術要求（Hálózati Csatlakozási Szabályzat，HCSZ）。配電層級連接由各區域配電系統運營商（DSO）在MEKH監管下負責。電網額定電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz，與歐盟標準相同，但與中國220/380 V基線不同。

standards_or_laws: MAVIR Hálózati Csatlakozási Szabályzat (HCSZ) — Hungarian grid connection technical requirements
Hungarian Energy and Public Utility Regulatory Authority (MEKH) oversight framework

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or MAVIR HCSZ requirements for Hungarian/EU market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (typically accredited under EA/DAkkS/UKAS or Hungarian NAH accreditation), and must satisfy the MAVIR grid connection technical requirements. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in Hungary. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles (Hungary 230/400 V vs. China 220/380 V), reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 vs. Chinese Modbus/CAN conventions). MAVIR and DSO grid-connection applications must be submitted in Hungarian.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被匈牙利/欧盟市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或MAVIR HCSZ要求的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（通常经EA/DAkkS/UKAS或匈牙利NAH认可）重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足MAVIR并网技术要求。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在匈牙利具有直接法律效力。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同（匈牙利230/400 V vs 中国220/380 V）、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同（IEC 61850对比中国Modbus/CAN惯例）。MAVIR及配电运营商并网申请须以匈牙利语提交。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被匈牙利/歐盟市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或MAVIR HCSZ要求的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（通常經EA/DAkkS/UKAS或匈牙利NAH認可）重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足MAVIR並網技術要求。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在匈牙利具有直接法律效力。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同（匈牙利230/400 V vs 中國220/380 V）、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通信協議要求不同（IEC 61850對比中國Modbus/CAN慣例）。MAVIR及配電運營商並網申請須以匈牙利語提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive / relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law; MAVIR HCSZ is mandatory for grid connection approval in Hungary.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Hungarian/EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and compliance with MAVIR HCSZ grid-connection technical requirements is required before connecting to any Hungarian grid. Grid-connection applications to MAVIR and DSOs must be submitted in Hungarian. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合匈牙利/欧盟并网要求。在接入任何匈牙利电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新测试，并符合MAVIR HCSZ并网技术要求。向MAVIR及配电运营商提交的并网申请须以匈牙利语进行。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合匈牙利/歐盟並網要求。在接入任何匈牙利電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2的完整重新測試，並符合MAVIR HCSZ並網技術要求。向MAVIR及配電運營商提交的並網申請須以匈牙利語進行。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室。
